notes: Spec asserts: ready → working, state stays working across all retry cycles (no flicker to ready or waiting between attempts), final working → ready. The recipe drives a deterministic failing-then-passing bash sequence (bash 'false' then bash 'echo recovered') in ONE turn: the parser sees one user_message, multiple assistant(tool_calls)→tool_result cycles, then a text-only assistant (turn_done). A failing tool_result carries no IsError for vibe (the adapter reads no status field) so it is just continued activity — turn_done is the only ready settle. The intermediate_working phase pins the no-flicker invariant with duration_at_least_ms 2000 — long enough to span both retry cycles given typical vibe latency. If the parser ever surfaced a tool_result as a transition to ready or waiting, this phase fires. BACKFLOW (live recording): mistral-vibe is a presession adapter — a transient proc-<PID> row is born ready before the real session_<id> transcript dir appears, then reconciles to a DIFFERENT session_id, so the birth is modeled as two phases (presession_birth → session_birth new_session) templated from the codex sibling, with every post-birth phase anchored same_session_as session_birth. OBSERVATIONS reduced to agent-only (cost_nonzero=false, tokens_nonzero=false): the offline replay golden stages only transcript.jsonl, so vibe's meta.json sidecar model + tokens are unverifiable offline (same as kiro-cli).

text: proc-<PID> pre-session appears in ready within 1s of launch (PID bound before the transcript dir exists)
Real session_<id> reconciles (different session_id) when the transcript directory appears, born ready
vibe PID bound to the real session (matched by cwd)
User prompt drives ready → working (spec bullet 1)

State stays working across the failing bash 'false' and the corrective bash 'echo recovered' — the failing tool_result (no IsError for vibe) must NOT flicker the session to ready or waiting before the recovery cycle (spec bullet 2)
After the final successful attempt, the text-only assistant reply settles turn_done: working → ready (spec bullet 3); final state ready
